ModMetaData.name: Bionic Thumb Guild
ModMetaData.author: Sam Hunt
ModMetaData.description:
The Bionic Thumb Guild is proud to present its flagship product: the Bionic Thumb.
"But it's a whole hand," you say. Yes. The Guild knows. They just really, really care about thumbs. Every finger on this prosthetic is engineered to support the thumb. The thumb is the star. The other fingers are backup dancers.
Features: - Full bionic hand prosthetic with 120% manipulation - Not legally a hand; for more info please seek legal advice - Surgery recipe (your doctor will not question the name) - Stocked by all Orbital traders (may or may not be for sale)
The Bionic Thumb Guild: because every hand deserves a better thumb.
